raw_consumer_statement: I placed a dispute for an item that I purchased from XXXX. I returned the item to them and the credit card company said that they did not approve the dispute. The amount of dispute is {$39.00} the transaction the dispute was filed on XX/XX/25. I have proof that in the form of prepaid label that the item was returned. I have several emails from the company stating they received the item back as well. They failed to provide me a refund or credit. That is why I opened the dispute. My credit card company did not even ask for any additional information. I would have provided them with proof of that I returned the item as requested from XXXX.
